# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

parameters:
  - name: storageAccountName
    type: string
    displayName: Storage Account Name

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    name: $(storageAccountName)
    location: <your_location>
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    properties:
      accountTier: Standard
      accountKind: StorageV2
      accessTier: Hot
      enableHttpsTrafficOnly: true

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/blobContainers
    name: logs
    dependsOn:
      - $(storageAccountName)
    properties:
      publicAccess: Container

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/blobContainers
    name: backups
    dependsOn:
      - $(storageAccountName)
    properties:
      publicAccess: Container
